title: Robot ramship

{{Quote|Captain Semmac! Those frigates are camouflaged robot ramships! Their guns are harmless. They are merely trying to get in close enough to—|[[Hortel Ossilege]], under attack from four robot ramships|<ref name="SaC" />}}
The '''robot [[ramship]]''' was a form of automated starship used for [[Ramming/Legends|ramming]] by a variety of mercenaries and pirates including the [[Sacorrian Triad]] and their [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] allies during the [[Corellian Crisis]].

==Characteristics==
{{Quote|They've released the ramship!|[[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]]|<ref name="ANT" />}}
[[File:RobotRamshipAft-FF112.png|thumb|left|250px|A aft view of a robot ramship engines]]
A typical robot [[ramship]] was an automated, gestalt [[Starship/Legends|starship]] assembled by outlaw techs, usually in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. These shady individuals took the shell of a junked [[Warship/Legends|warship]], often of [[Corellian Engineering Corporation/Legends|Corellian Engineering Corporation]] design, and packed the hollow interior with solid [[Durasteel/Legends|durasteel]].<ref name="EGD" /> This packing was focused towards the front of the vessel, creating a toughened bow capable of smashing through shields and thick hulls,<ref name="FF112" /> which usually featured a bulbous nose. This afforded the ramship incredible mass, which translated to incredible kinetic energy which was used to impact against an enemy vessel in a multimegaton explosion.<ref name="EGD" /> Some were also fitted with additional charges set to ignite on or shortly after impact, ensuring total annihilation of a target.<ref name="FF112" /> However, the solid interior also made the ramship difficult to maneuver.<ref name="EGD" /> Ramships were designed to be solid metal bullets used specifically for suicide runs.<ref name="NEG">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''</ref>

The vessel's exterior was modified to give the false ramship the appearance of a typical ship of the line. The hull was customized with dozens of painted-on portholes, observation ports, and underpowered [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannons]] and [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolasers]], while structural support rods helped keep the vessel intact. The hull was thick enough to absorb even sustained [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] volleys. In order to achieve ramming speed, these vessels were fitted with high-acceleration quad engines fed by engine-blast boost lines, which provided the ramships with high boost.<ref name="EGD" /> These engine arrays were designed to provide enough thrust to drive the weapon towards its target, and could only operate on full power for a few moments.<ref name="FF112" />

Because of the suicidal nature of a ramship's missions, these vessels were not crewed by organics; rather, the ship's computer core was fitted with a [[Droid brain/Legends|droid brain]]. This unstable [[Pilot droid/Legends|droid pilot]] had the intelligence to put up a convincing fight against enemy vessels, and was crazed enough to destroy itself by [[Ramming/Legends|ramming]] its target at the first opportunity. Ramships were also installed with an extensive database of military tactics, and, unlike the droid brains utilized in [[Drone barge/Legends|drone barges]], lacked any self-preservation safeties. A guidance computer and an extendible sensor suite assisted the droid [[Pilot/Legends|pilots]] in their suicide missions.<ref name="EGD" />

==History==
{{Quote|We are well aware of the ramship, Ulu. Someone more experienced—and wiser—than you will deal with it.|[[Glynn-Beti]] to [[Ulu Ulix]]|<ref name="ANT" />}}
[[Ramship]]s were ancient weapons that saw use since the earliest days of space warfare,<ref name="FF112" /> and became infamous as a deceptive and dishonorable innovation in the history of combat.<ref name="EGD" /> Typically designed and outfitted from stolen [[Starship/Legends|starships]] by criminal techs in the most notorious regions of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]],<ref name="ANT" /> these ships were not officially manufactured or advertised. They saw extensive use by outlaw armadas,<ref name="EGD" /> and became feared by [[Commander/Legends|commanders]] and experienced veterans. Even ramships which were successfully disintegrated still produced a debris field that could cause catastrophic damage to a target vessel. Most commanders learned to make immediate evasive maneuvers when faced with a ramship.<ref name="FF112" />

[[File:Not_a_Corellian_frigate.jpg|right|thumb|250px|Robot ramships were used by the Sacorrian Triad during the Battle of Centerpoint Station.]]
During the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], [[Wat Tambor/Legends|Wat Tambor]] utilized a robot ramship in the [[Battle of Xagobah (Clone Wars)|Battle of Xagobah]], targeting a [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] [[Acclamator-class transgalactic military assault ship/Legends|''Acclamator''-class assault ship]] with the intent of destroying it. The tactic was anticipated by [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] and [[Ulu Ulix]], who flew a [[Swoop/Legends|swoop]] towards the drone ship. Ulix was shot down, though rescued by Fett, and [[Glynn-Beti]] assured the youngsters that the ramship would be taken care of. Soon enough, [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] led a [[IG-227 Hailfire-class droid tank/Legends|''Hailfire''-class droid tank]] to fire at the ramship while attempting to shoot down his [[Eta-2 Actis-class interceptor/Legends|interceptor]]. The ''Hailfire''{{'s}} plasma bursts hit the ramship, releasing the stored kinetic energy within and destroying the vessel in an energy surge that also scrambled the circuits of Tambor's [[Battle droid/Legends|battle droids]].<ref name="ANT" />

During the [[Battle of Centerpoint Station (Corellian Crisis)|Battle of Centerpoint Station]] in [[18 ABY/Legends|18 ABY]], which concluded the [[Corellian Crisis]], the [[Sacorrian Triad]] deployed shoals of these deadly starships against the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]-allied [[Bakuran Defense Fleet]]. Four refitted [[Unidentified frigate class|frigates]] modified into ramships targeted the flagship—the [[Namana-class light cruiser|''Namana''-class Light Cruiser]] [[Intruder (Namana-class)|''Intruder'']]—by first firing upon it to create confusion for the [[Bakuran]]s. By the time [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Hortel Ossilege]] realized the laser fire was merely a diversion from the true threat, it was too late for the unfortunate Bakuran crewers. Soon, three of these vessels had rammed the ''Intruder'', though the fourth failed. As the crew of the ''Intruder'' rushed into [[Escape pod/Legends|escape pods]], Ossilege and the Bakuran representative [[Gaeriel Captison]] succeeded in self-destructing the ship. The wrecked ''Intruder'' flew into the heart of the Sacorrian fleet and exploded, taking out much of the enemy force and clearing the way for New Republic reinforcements.<ref name="SaC" />

==Appearances==

*''[[Showdown at Centerpoint]]'' {{1st}}
